commands.review_summary:
This PR adds process-local quarantine for failing non-legacy context engines, downgrades later context-engine work to legacy, refreshes owner metadata after fallback, exposes quarantine health state, and updates docs plus fixture coverage.

PR surface: Source +442, Tests +469, Docs +14, Other +26. Total +951 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a medium-confidence reproduction path: current main captures context-engine owner metadata before later lifecycle failures and has no runtime quarantine wrapper. I did not execute a live failing plugin repro in this read-only review.
